prompt: I'm adding an AI image feature to my Next.js app and we run everything on Vertex AI (GCP project 'acme-prod'). Write me a TypeScript helper using @google/genai that generates a 2K, 16:9 image with Nano Banana Pro from a text prompt and saves the resulting PNG to disk. Include the exact model id and the client setup for Vertex.

assertions.text: Uses model id 'gemini-3-pro-image' (the current GA id), not a hallucinated name
Does NOT use 'nano-banana-pro' as a callable model string
Vertex client init: new GoogleGenAI({ vertexai: true, project, location })
Sets resolution/ratio under config.imageConfig (imageSize '2K', aspectRatio '16:9') — the shipped SDK field, NOT responseFormat
Reads image bytes from response.candidates[0].content.parts -> part.inlineData.data via Buffer.from(data,'base64')
Uses GCP/ADC auth for Vertex (not a Gemini API key)
